SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource

Interface FileFormat

public interface FileFormat
Interface for file format implementations that can parse file content into Arrow record batches.

Implement this interface to support custom file formats (e.g., TSV, JSON, Parquet) with DataFusion's listing table feature. When a query scans a listing table, DataFusion calls fileSource() to obtain a FileSource, which in turn creates a FileOpener bound to the table's schema and allocator.

Example: 

class TsvFormat implements FileFormat {
    @Override public String getExtension() {
        return ".tsv";
    }
    @Override public FileSource fileSource() {
        return new TsvFileSource();
    }
}
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: FileFormat

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileSource
    fileSource()
    Creates a FileSource that can produce FileOpeners for this format.
    String
    getExtension()
    Returns the file extension including dot (e.g., ".tsv", ".csv").

  • Method Details

    • getExtension

      String getExtension()
      Returns the file extension including dot (e.g., ".tsv", ".csv").

      Example: 

      FileFormat format = new TsvFormat();
String ext = format.getExtension(); // ".tsv"
ListingOptions options = ListingOptions.builder(format)
    .build();
      Returns:
      the file extension
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: FileFormat::get_ext

    • fileSource

      FileSource fileSource()
      Creates a FileSource that can produce FileOpeners for this format.

      Example: 

      FileFormat format = new TsvFormat();
FileSource source = format.fileSource();
FileOpener opener = source.createFileOpener(
    schema, allocator, scanConfig);
      Returns:
      a FileSource for this format
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: FileFormat::file_source
